page.quick_input.title: Quick Input
page.quick_input.subtitle: Type in the floating window and press Enter to auto-translate and send to VRChat.
page.quick_input.no_recent: No translation yet. The latest original and translation will appear here.
page.ocr.title: OCR Translation
page.ocr.subtitle: Select a VRChat window region, recognize text locally and display translation in a floating overlay.
page.ocr.privacy: Privacy: Only captures the selected VRChat window region; frames are processed in memory only and are never saved or uploaded.
page.settings.title: Settings
page.settings.subtitle: Four independent sections; save is always visible
page.settings.leave_info: Save before leaving, or discard changes.
osc.sound: Play Chatbox notification sound on send
osc.typing_note: Typing state is always enabled: typing=true when input is active, false on idle, send, hide, or exit.
osc.note: Quick Input and OCR overlay are independent; this only adjusts the self-message input window.
ocr_settings.preview_hint: Preview is not saved to disk
ocr_settings.unsupported: Capture succeeded but preview format is unsupported
ocr_settings.scheduler_note: Low-latency services use up to 2 concurrent workers; LLM services use 1. Expired results are not displayed.
ocr_settings.passthrough_hint: When checked, overlay cannot be dragged; uncheck first to move
ocr_models.note: Installed models stay in data/models/ocr. data/cache/ocr-models only holds temporary downloads and is cleaned automatically. Both are beside the application.
ocr_models.verifying: Download complete. Verifying and installing the model…
ocr_models.storage_summary: Shared components {shared} MiB · local OCR models total {total} MiB
data.diag_note: Diagnostic info does not include API keys, chat content, OCR text, or captured frames.
quick_input.placeholder: Press Enter to send to VRChat
ocr_overlay.title: VRCTranslate OCR Translation
ocr_overlay.drag_handle: OCR Translation · Drag here to move
region_selector.hint: Drag to select OCR region; Esc to cancel. Smaller regions are faster and more accurate. Nothing is saved to disk.
ctrl.ocr_no_window_msg: Please select a running VRChat window.
ctrl.ocr_no_region_msg: Please select a recognition region first.
ctrl.ocr_mss_hint: MSS compatibility mode: main window hidden; keep VRChat visible and do not cover the recognition area
ctrl.ocr_exclusion_failed: Could not exclude overlay from capture; in MSS mode move overlay outside recognition area
ctrl.ocr_inline_exclusion_failed: Inline text could not be excluded from capture; switched back to the separate translation overlay.
ctrl.self.overflow: Message exceeds length limit, original text restored
ctrl.self.sent: Sent to OSC; VRChat does not provide delivery confirmation
ctrl.self.failed: Translation failed, original text restored; check logs
ctrl.self.status_sent: OSC data sent to local UDP
ctrl.settings.save_disk: Save failed: data directory is not writable
ctrl.settings.testing_visual: Testing the vision service with an in-memory generated image...
ctrl.settings.test_ok_glossary_fallback: Translation available · Glossary marker unstable, plain fallback used: {text}
ctrl.settings.test_help_configuration: Check the endpoint, model, language direction, and required fields, then retry.
ctrl.settings.test_help_authentication: Check that the API key or Tencent SecretId/SecretKey is valid and has permission to call the service.
ctrl.settings.test_help_quota: Check the account balance, API quota, and request rate, then retry later.
ctrl.settings.test_help_network: Check the network, proxy, firewall, and whether the service endpoint is reachable.
ctrl.settings.test_help_service: The cloud service may be unavailable or rejecting requests. Retry later and check its console.
ctrl.settings.test_help_response: The response format is incompatible. Confirm that the endpoint and model support the expected API format.
ctrl.settings.test_help_unexpected: Check the current configuration and retry. If it persists, inspect the log under Portable Data & Diagnostics.
ctrl.settings.logs_failed: Log cleanup failed; delete manually after closing the app
profile.help_test: Validates UI and OSC only, no real translation.
profile.help_deepl: Low latency, high quality; suitable for real-time OCR. Uses official endpoint when URL is empty.
profile.help_google_cloud: Wide language coverage, low latency; suitable for real-time OCR.
profile.help_google_free: Free Google Translate API, no API key required; usually needs proxy in mainland China.
profile.help_tencent: Tencent Cloud TMT, requires SecretId and SecretKey; rate-limited to 5 req/s, no auto-detect.
profile.help_openai: Strong conversational quality but higher latency; not recommended for real-time OCR.
profile.help_multimodal: Sends the selected region directly to a compatible vision model for recognition and translation. OCR only; the image stays in memory locally but is uploaded to your configured service. Translation disables recognized reasoning modes by default and limits runaway output.
profile.placeholder_url: Leave empty to use default endpoint
profile.placeholder_tencent_id: Tencent Cloud SecretId, stored as plaintext in data/config.json
profile.placeholder_tencent_key: Tencent Cloud SecretKey, stored as plaintext in data/config.json
profile.placeholder_google_free: Leave empty to use translate.googleapis.com free endpoint
profile.name: Profile Name
profile.warning: Service credentials are stored as plaintext in portable data/config.json; do not share this file.
profile.min_one: At least one profile is required.
route.romaji_force: Force: this text is Japanese romaji
route.romaji_help_off: No kana conversion is applied. Input and OCR text are sent to the translator unchanged.
route.romaji_help_auto: Converts only likely Japanese romaji. English, URLs, usernames, and uncertain text remain unchanged.
route.romaji_help_force: Converts unprotected Latin text as Japanese romaji. English may also be converted; use only when the text is known to be romaji.
route.romaji_help_unavailable: Romaji handling is inactive because the source language is neither Japanese nor Auto.
route.romaji_help_multimodal: The vision model reads image text directly; local romaji preprocessing is not applied.
route.glossary_enabled: Use the glossary on this route
route.glossary_status_none: {profile} · Test echo does not use the glossary
route.ocr_warning_llm: OCR is using an LLM; latency may not meet real-time requirements. Consider DeepL, Google or Tencent instead.
route.ocr_warning_multimodal: Privacy notice: the selected region will be sent to your configured cloud vision service and will not be saved locally. Continuous mode incurs API usage and is throttled to at least 3 seconds.
route.ocr_warning_default: OCR uses a bounded low-latency queue; results from old sessions are discarded after stop/restart.
glossary.same_language: Source and target languages must be different
glossary.duplicate: A user term with the same direction and source already exists.
glossary.imported: Imported {count} terms; save changes to apply
ctrl.ocr.cannot_select_msg: Please start and select a VRChat window first.
ctrl.ocr.region_saved: Recognition region saved to portable text config
ctrl.ocr.test_needs_stop: Please stop OCR before running a test capture.
ctrl.ocr.test_needs_window: Please select a VRChat window on the OCR page first.
ctrl.ocr.capture_test_ok: Test capture OK: {width}×{height}; {diag}; frame kept in memory only
capture.status_window: Window content capture; unaffected by overlapping windows
capture.status_screen: Screen coordinate capture; VRChat must remain visible and unobstructed
page.ocr.subtitle_new: Use the OCR orb to select VRChat text. Runtime status, mode, and languages below are read-only; frames are never saved.
page.ocr.no_recent: No OCR translation yet. The latest result will appear here.
page.ocr.overlay_title: OCR translation display and inline text
ocr_orb.tooltip: Click to start or pause; drag to move; right-click for OCR commands
ocr_region.title: OCR region
ctrl.ocr_continuous_running: Continuous OCR is running with periodic capture and local change filtering
ctrl.ocr_region_removed: OCR region removed; use the orb to select another region
ctrl.ocr_target_selected: Target application changed; use the orb to select an OCR region
